items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi upgrade to Buy
items.snippet: Citi upgraded ALB to Buy citing excellent asset portfolio, global lithium refining network, and capacity to invest in growth projects. ESS production forecast to reach 950 GWh this year, +35% YoY.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC boosted its price target t

items.headline: Albemarle Q1 2026 Earnings: Net sales increased 70% year-over-year
items.snippet: First quarter net sales increased 70% year-over-year due to higher pricing and volumes. Adjusted EBITDA nearly tripled. Global lithium consumption up 37%, with energy storage demand up 117% year over year.
